name: Envoy
description: Verify workplace security through Envoy visitor management - review employee access, visitor sign-in flows, and location configurations.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to the Envoy Dev Dashboard at https://dashboard.envoy.com
2. Navigate to Integrations > Dev Dashboard
3. Click 'Create New'
4. Provide a name for your integration (e.g., 'CompAI')
5. Under API Scopes, add: employees.read, locations.read, flows.read
6. Save the integration
7. Copy your Client API Key from the integration settings
8. Paste it below

checks.name: Envoy Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all employees registered in Envoy to verify user access and directory completeness.

checks.name: Envoy Visitor Sign-In Flows
checks.description: Verifies that visitor and employee sign-in flows are configured and enabled in Envoy locations.

checks.name: Envoy Location Configuration
checks.description: Verifies that company locations are configured and active in Envoy.
